About Dr. Vijay Anand Reddy

A distinguished oncologist with over three decades of experience, dedicated to providing world-class cancer care.

"I Am A Survivor" Book Author

Sharing hope through 108 inspiring cancer survivor stories

Qualifications & Expertise

MD (Radiation Oncology)
DNB (Radiation Oncology)
European Certification in Medical Oncology (ESMO)
FUICC (UK), FNDM (USA), FUICC (AUS)
Sr. Consultant Oncologist
Prof. & Head, Dept. of Radiation Oncology
Director, Apollo Cancer Center, Hyderabad

Our Mission

"To provide world-class cancer care with cutting-edge technology, personalized treatment plans, and unwavering compassion..."

"
"

Swipe or Click

Comprehensive Cancer Care Services

State-of-the-art treatments and compassionate care across all cancer specialties, tailored to each patient's unique needs and circumstances.

Radiation Oncology

Precise, technologically advanced cancer treatment with expert clinical support in Hyderabad

  • IMRT/IGRT/SRS/SRT/RapidArc
  • External Beam Therapy
  • Brachytherapy
  • Stereotactic Radiosurgery
Learn More →

Medical Oncology

Advanced chemotherapy, immunotherapy and targeted drug therapies for comprehensive cancer management

  • Chemotherapy
  • Immunotherapy
  • Targeted Therapy
  • Hormonal Therapy
Learn More →

Proton Therapy

Effective targeted cancer treatment with minimized side effects, especially for tumors near vital organs

  • High Precision Radiation
  • Minimal Side Effects
  • Pediatric Cancer Care
  • Organ Preservation
Learn More →

Head & Neck Cancer

Specialized multidisciplinary care for cancers of the head and neck region with advanced treatment options

  • Multidisciplinary Approach
  • Organ Preservation
  • Reconstructive Surgery
  • Rehabilitation Support
Learn More →

Throat Cancer

Expert diagnosis, advanced surgery and radiation, plus holistic support for optimal outcomes

  • Minimally Invasive Surgery
  • Targeted Radiation
  • Speech Rehabilitation
  • Swallowing Therapy
Learn More →

Eye Cancer

Comprehensive diagnosis, precise surgical and medical care, and holistic support for eye cancer patients

  • Advanced Imaging
  • Vision-Preserving Surgery
  • Targeted Therapy
  • Immunotherapy
Learn More →

Need a Consultation?

Get personalized treatment recommendations from Dr. Vijay Anand Reddy and his expert team.

Schedule Consultation

Why Choose Dr. Vijay Anand Reddy?

Trusted by thousands of patients and families for exceptional cancer care, advanced treatments, and compassionate support throughout the healing journey.

30+ Years Experience

Three decades of excellence in radiation oncology and cancer treatment

25,000+ Patients Treated

Successfully treated thousands of patients with various cancer types

95% Success Rate

Exceptional treatment outcomes with industry-leading success rates

Compassionate Care

Patient-centered approach with emotional support throughout treatment

International Recognition

Global certifications and recognition from leading medical institutions

Advanced Technology

State-of-the-art equipment and cutting-edge treatment modalities

Ready to Begin Your Healing Journey?

Join thousands of patients who have trusted Dr. Vijay Anand Reddy for their cancer care. Schedule your consultation today and take the first step towards recovery.

Book Consultation Call +91-9676720002

Awards & Recognition

Dr. Vijay Anand Reddy's commitment to excellence has been recognized through numerous prestigious awards and international certifications.

2025

Clinical Pioneer Award

Awarded on Apollo Founder's Day for outstanding patient care and dedication to Apollo mission.

Clinical Excellence
2024

Gold Medal – Best Scientific Paper

AROICON 2024 for prospective study on patient-reported toxicities & QOL in SBRT Prostate.

Research Excellence
2024

ISOO 2024 Oration

International Society of Ocular Oncology, Goa for contributions to ocular oncology.

Ophthalmology
2022

Gold Medal – Best Scientific Paper

AROICON 2022 for feasibility study on extreme hypofractionation in post-operative breast cancer.

Research Excellence
2019

Dr. B. D. Gupta Memorial Oration Award

41st AROICON, Ahmedabad for outstanding contribution in Radiation Oncology.

Oncology Excellence
2019

Excellence Award

Lions Club International in association with Apollo Hospitals for extraordinary service in Oncology.

Medical Excellence
View More

Fellowships

Global recognition through prestigious international medical training programs

2010
Stereotactic Radiosurgery Fellowship
Klinikum Frankfurt (Oder) GmbH, Frankfurt, Germany
2003
Ocular Oncology Fellowship
Will's Eye Hospital, Philadelphia, USA
2003
Pediatric Oncology Fellowship
Children's Hospital of Philadelphia, USA
1998
Head & Neck Oncology Fellowship
Peter McCallum Cancer Institute, Melbourne, Australia
1995
Nargis Dutt Memorial Cancer Foundation Fellowship
New York Hospital, Medical Centre of Queens, NY, USA
1992
Clinical Oncology Fellowship
Meyerstein Institute of Clinical Oncology, Middlesex Hospital, London
View More

Memberships

Active affiliations with leading international oncology societies and committees

Full Member
American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO)
Full Member
American Society for Radiation Oncology (ASTRO)
Permanent Member
European Society of Medical Oncology (ESMO)
Member
International American Brachytherapy Society (ABS)
Permanent Member
Union for International Cancer Control (UICC), Geneva
Advisory Committee Member
Global Access to Cancer Care Foundation (GACCF), USA
View More
#1 Highest Rated Oncologist in India

Most Reviewed & Highest Rated Oncologist in India

Dr. Vijay Anand Reddy holds the record for the highest number of Google reviews and maintains the highest rating among oncologists in India, reflecting exceptional patient satisfaction.

4.9/5

Google Rating

Based on 2,847 reviews

#1

Top Oncologist

In India

2,847

Google Reviews

Highest in India

98.7%

5-Star Reviews

Exceptional satisfaction

Uday Pepe

Breast Cancer Survivor

"One stop for all cancer treatment - doctor holds that crucial communication and support, helping patients and their families understand the diagnosis providing treatment options, prognosis, and how to navigate during treatment. Been to many hospitals across twin cities for mother's treatment and Vijay Anand Reddy sir remains irreplaceable and best one 😊"

Satvinder Saluja

Lung Cancer Survivor

"Good treatment with Good precision surgery performed everything 💯 % .I will recommend another patient .he was given Good and best treatment for me he look like to God for me .and all doctors and staff very helpful and 👍 good"

Anitha Kesireddy

Head & Neck Cancer Survivor

"Satisfied with the services.Dr.vijay Anand Reddy sir was excellent Doctor.he was talking like family member.we are happy to take treatment here.thanks to Dr.vijay Anand Reddy sir and sir team Doctors and sir supportive assistant s was good corporate thanks to every one He is very concern for the patient, gives hope and confidence.Our whole family owe to him forever.Thank you very much sir 🙏🙏🙏"

rishika avaldar

Brain Tumor Survivor

"Very grateful for Dr. Vijay Anand Reddy and team for successfully treating my moms cervical cancer. Their expertise, care and support helped our family through a very difficult time. Couldn’t have asked for better support and treatment."

kumari daniel

Cervical Cancer Survivor

"Dr.vijay anand reddy .He is most caring and understanding doctor I have ever met.he really cares about the patient and their health he ever proposes the best solutions for everything he answers simple questions asked by the patient hope he and his family stay safe and happy Thank you"
